audit_items.proof_trace: The branch at L75-79 correctly implements the property: solution.length == 0 triggers forceApprove(address(auction), s_auction.getAssetOutAmount(assetIn, amount, block.timestamp)) before auction.bid(); solution.length > 0 encodes data for callback and defers approval to auctionCallback L111. The pre-approved amount matches the amount BaseAuction.bid() pulls at L453 because both computations use the same block.timestamp, same elapsedTime, and same price oracle within a single transaction — the only difference (withValidation flag) only affects error handling, not the computed value when prices are valid.
